violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Open boxes of food were stored on the floor in the deli walk in freezer.
Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Vacuum packaged bologna in the cold case by the deli was dated sell by May 3. This must be discarded.

Reduced-oxygen packaging. — --Establishment using reduced-oxygen process was not properly labeling the food packages. Vacuum sealed packages of Swiss cheese in the cold case by the deli were dated November 7, 2026 and November 15, 2026. These dates exceeds the 30 days allowed.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The shelves under the cutting table and slicer in the meat department need to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The hood system in the deli needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floors in the deli under the center table and storage shelves need to be cleaned. The wall behind the saw in the meat department needs to be cleaned.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet wiping cloths were stored on the counter in the deli across from the ovens. These need to be stored in sanitizer solution when not in use.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The black fan in the deli needs to be cleaned.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. The paper towel dispenser in the deli was empty.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
